_comment: WP-W2-17 T7 — seo_probe.mjs route manifest. Route set = team_90's CR1-4 rollup ('the 16 in-scope routes'): CONTENT-ACCURACY-REPORT-CR-FINAL-2026-07-02.md §1 (table, lines 43-58) + evidence/content-accuracy-cr-final-2026-07-02/summary.json (pagesTotal=19, pagesMeasured=17, gateWouldPassCount=16). /eyal-amit/mokesh-dahiman/ is measured but explicitly OUT of the CR1-4 rollup ('out of rollup' / '* mokesh measured but excluded from CR1-4 rollup per §6') and is NOT included here; /galleries/ and /media/ are N/A (no source doc) and also excluded. This manifest is the AC-007 / T7 authored artifact (did not pre-exist).
_expectedTypesSource: Per-route expected @type set for check #7 (Appendix B, SEO-GEO-RESEARCH-SYNTHESIS-2026-07-02.md :321): home = Person+ProfessionalService; service slugs (treatment/sound-healing/lessons) = +Service; posts = Article. C-2 (DECISION-WP-W2-17-RATIFICATIONS-2026-07-03.md item 9): /method/ is the methodology entity, NOT a bookable service -> must NOT expect a Service node. Verified against the live schema emitter site/wp-content/mu-plugins/ea-w2-seo-schema.php:98-117 (services map = treatment/sound-healing/lessons only; Person emitted globally; ProfessionalService emitted globally).

routes.name: method
routes.note: C-2 ratified (DECISION-WP-W2-17-RATIFICATIONS-2026-07-03.md item 9): NOT a Service node — do not add Service here.

routes.name: mokesh-dahiman
routes.note: WP-CANON T1 (2026-07-14+). Person here checks presence of the @type only (satisfied by the global Eyal node too) — the Mokesh-specific @id must be verified separately (LOD400 T1 §5). VideoObject = the official trailer (kf4NKSdYi9E), deliberately NOT framed as hero decoration — see LOD400 T1 §3.4 for the 'no VideoObject on the muted hero loop' prohibition this must not trip.

brandExemptRoutes._comment: Check #12 (brand-string absence). AC-09 re-scope (SEO-GEO-ROUND2-COMPLETION-2026-06-21.md :35; ratified permanent+final in DECISION-WP-W2-17-RATIFICATIONS-2026-07-03.md item 4): the retired brand string legitimately persists in 6 verbatim customer-testimonial quotes carried in site/wp-content/themes/ea-eyalamit/inc/data/ea-testimonials-fb.json (grep-verified: 6 occurrences of the brand string in that file, matching the '6 verbatim testimonial quotes' language in both source docs). NO document enumerates a route-to-quote mapping; the exemption as ratified is FILE-scoped (the JSON data source), not ROUTE-scoped. This list is the builder's best-effort reconstruction of which of the 16 rollup routes can render that testimonial corpus (traced via PHASE2-TESTIMONIALS-FLAGS-COMPLETE-2026-06-21.md: service pages get per-category FB testimonials appended [treatment+method<-tipul, sound-healing<-sound_healing, lessons<-shiurim]; home shows 15 curated source-verbatim testimonials broad-set; /media/ and /faq/ are out of the 16-route rollup or not applicable). Flagged as an open question in the T7 handoff -- do NOT silently trust this list without team_90 ratifying it against the actual rendered HTML.

tagline._comment: Check #4 compares meta description against the WordPress bloginfo tagline. The DB dump (local/eyalamit-staging-20260411.sql) shows option 'blogdescription' = '' (empty) as of that snapshot. seo_probe.mjs fetches the live tagline via the site's RSS feed (/feed/, <description> element) at runtime rather than trusting a possibly-stale hardcoded value here; this field is a fallback only if the live feed fetch fails.
